notes: Cash equities closed today for Juneteenth — no live trading; VIX 16.8 and a constructive but rate-sensitive tape (Iran-deal optimism vs. Fed-hike worries after strong jobs). Holding risk at 0.45 ahead of next week's economic data slate and reassess Monday.
journal_entry: Juneteenth holiday again — exchanges closed, holding flat at 0.45 neutral. Tape stays healthy (VIX 16.8, chip leadership intact) but markets are pricing higher rates and a busy data week (June 22-26) looms. Avoids unchanged: parabolic AMC/BFLY/GPUS, CLOV spec, AAPL extended, AMD/ROKU/SABR soft. Chip theme MU/MRVL/SNDK/NBIS still the leaders; reassess re-risking Monday on yields and rally follow-through.
